name: Enxara – Loop tour from Amoreiras-Odemira
name_original: Enxara – Giro ad anello da Amoreiras-Odemira
region_intro: Gravel biking around São Martinho Das Amoreiras offers routes through the rural landscapes of the Alentejo region. The terrain typically features rolling hills, agricultural fields, and river valleys, with a network of unpaved roads and tracks. These paths often traverse areas characterized by cork oak forests and Mediterranean scrubland. The region's topography provides varied gradients suitable for different levels of gravel biking. Best gravel bike trails around São Martinho Das Amoreiras The most popular gravel bike trail is Ourique BTT Route P56, a 78.2 miles (125.8 km) trail that takes about 7 hours 37 minutes to complete. This difficult route features significant elevation gain through the Alentejo countryside. Another top favourite among local gravel bikers is Enxara – Loop tour from Amoreiras-Odemira, an easy 9.5 miles (15.2 km) path. This route offers a shorter, less strenuous ride through local landscapes. Local gravel bikers also love the Funcheira Railway Station – Wildflower Meadow loop from Monte do Saraiva, a 20.6 miles (33.2 km) trail leading through rural areas and open meadows, often completed in about 2 hours 40 minutes. Gravel biking around São Martinho Das Amoreiras is defined by rolling hills, river valleys, and rural tracks, offering a mix of open landscapes and forested sections. The network provides options for different ability levels, from easy loops to more advanced gravel biking trails. The routes in São Martinho Das Amoreiras are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.0 stars from over 2 reviews. More than 6 gravel bikers have used komoot to explore São Martinho Das Amoreiras's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many gravel bike trails are available in São Martinho Das Amoreiras?
A: There are 5 gravel bike routes documented around São Martinho Das Amoreiras on komoot, offering a variety of experiences for different skill levels.

Q: What are the difficulty levels of gravel bike trails in São Martinho Das Amoreiras?
A: The trails range from easy to difficult. You'll find 2 easy routes, 1 moderate route, and 2 difficult routes, providing options for both beginners and experienced gravel bikers.

Q: Are there any easy gravel bike routes suitable for beginners or families?
A: Yes, for an easier ride, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2332086759/enxara-loop-tour-from-amoreiras-odemira" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Enxara – Loop tour from Amoreiras-Odemira&lt;/a&gt;, which is 9.5 miles (15.2 km) long. Another easy option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/32134012" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Big Dog loop from Residencial Marinel +18 (bordel)&lt;/a&gt;, covering 5.5 miles (8.9 km).

Q: Which gravel bike trails are more challenging for experienced riders?
A: For a more demanding experience, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2332093913/ourique-btt-route-p56" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ourique BTT Route P56&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 78.2 miles (125.8 km) trail with significant elevation gain. Another difficult option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/23770459" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Castro da Cola – Alento Ford on the Mira River loop from Castro de Cola&lt;/a&gt;, which is 22 miles (35.4 km) long.

Q: Are there any circular gravel bike routes in the area?
A: Several routes are designed as loops. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2332086759/enxara-loop-tour-from-amoreiras-odemira" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Enxara – Loop tour from Amoreiras-Odemira&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/32133883" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Funcheira Railway Station – Wildflower Meadow loop from Monte do Saraiva&lt;/a&gt; are both excellent circular options.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on gravel bike trails around São Martinho Das Amoreiras?
A: The region features rolling hills, agricultural fields, and river valleys. You'll ride on a network of unpaved roads and tracks, often traversing cork oak forests and Mediterranean scrubland, offering a mix of open landscapes and forested sections.

Q: What are some scenic viewpoints or attractions along the gravel bike routes?
A: You can find beautiful spots like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5476138" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Clara Dam&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4959619" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of the Santa Clara Dam and Gravel Roads&lt;/a&gt;. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4959632" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Alento River Crossing (Rio Mira)&lt;/a&gt; also offers picturesque views.

Q: What do other gravel bikers enjoy most about São Martinho Das Amoreiras?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.0 stars. Reviewers often praise the varied terrain, from rolling hills to river valleys, and the rural tracks that provide a true Alentejo gravel biking experience.

Q: What is the best season for gravel biking in São Martinho Das Amoreiras?
A: Spring and autumn are generally ideal, offering pleasant temperatures and lush landscapes. Summers can be very hot in the Alentejo region, so early morning rides are recommended if biking during this season.

Q: Are there any specific landmarks or facilities near the trails?
A: Yes, you might encounter the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4258736" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Clara-a-Velha Clock Tower&lt;/a&gt; and a cycling center in Santa Clara-a-Velha. There's also an &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4226371" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ourique Cycling Center&lt;/a&gt;, which can be useful for services.

Q: How long do the gravel bike routes typically take to complete?
A: Route durations vary significantly by length and difficulty. For instance, the easy &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2332086759/enxara-loop-tour-from-amoreiras-odemira" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Enxara – Loop tour from Amoreiras-Odemira&lt;/a&gt; takes about 1 hour 30 minutes, while the difficult &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2332093913/ourique-btt-route-p56" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ourique BTT Route P56&lt;/a&gt; can take over 7 hours.
tips: Amoreiras‑Gare originated around the historic 1888 railway station, later becoming a small industrial and commercial hub in the 20th century. Today, it hosts local events like the traditional “Festas de Maio” and offers nature trails for hikers.
Nice and fun gravel road especially during sunset or sunrise!
This nice gravel road runs parallel to the Ribeira das Pimentas, little creek.

waypoints.name: Nice gravel road near the Ribeira das Pimentas
